children.label: A
children.text: means the Armed Forces of Burma, including the army, navy, and air force; and

children.label: B
children.text: includes security services under the control of the Armed Forces of Burma, such as the police and border guards.

children.heading: Executive Order 14014
children.label: 2 Executive Order 14014
children.text: The term “Executive Order 14014” means Executive Order 14014 (86 Fed. Reg. 9429; relating to blocking property with respect to the situation in Burma).

children.heading: Genocide
children.label: 3 Genocide
children.text: The term “genocide” means any offense described in .section 1091(a) of title 18

children.heading: War crime
children.label: 4 War crime
children.text: The term “war crime” has the meaning given the term in .section 2441(c) of title 18
